title: TAUSIK Stack Declaration
description: Schema for stacks/<name>/stack.json files. Built-in stacks live in stacks/<name>/ and user overrides in .tausik/stacks/<name>/.

name.description: Stack identifier. Lowercase, starts with a letter, alphanumeric/underscore/dash.

extends.description: Optional inheritance: 'builtin:NAME' merges this decl on top of the named built-in stack. Used in .tausik/stacks/ to customize without redefining everything.

detect.description: Project-root signatures used by bootstrap_config.detect_stacks(). Empty/missing → stack is never auto-detected.

file.description: Filename, glob pattern, or dir name depending on `type`.

type.description: exact = isfile match; glob = recursive glob with depth cap; dir-marker = isdir match.

keyword.description: Optional substring required inside the matched file (only meaningful for type=exact|glob with files).

extensions.description: File extensions (incl. leading dot, e.g. '.py') that signal this stack. Powers gate_stack_dispatch._EXT_TO_STACKS.

filenames.description: Lowercase filenames (e.g. 'dockerfile', 'chart.yaml') that signal this stack regardless of extension. Powers gate_stack_dispatch._FILENAME_TO_STACKS.

path_hints.description: Path-fragment hints used to disambiguate YAML/JSON in IaC trees (e.g. '/playbooks/' → ansible). Each fragment must start and end with '/'.

gates.description: Stack-scoped gate definitions. Key = gate name, value = DEFAULT_GATES-shaped dict OR null to disable an inherited gate.

guide_path.description: Path to the stack guide (relative to the stack dir). Default 'guide.md'.

extensions_extra.description: Additive extensions applied on top of inherited 'extends' target — does NOT replace, merges. Useful in user overrides.
